exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your skill development forward
items: Create a structured daily practice schedule for your target skill with specific time blocks
Complete your first deliberate practice session following your established schedule
Record and analyze your practice session to identify specific areas for improvement
Seek feedback from an expert or experienced practitioner in your target skill area
Create a learning resource library with 5-10 high-quality materials specific to your skill
Build a practical project or application that demonstrates your developing skill
